legacy_absent_owned_paths..pdd/meta/agentic_common_python_run.json: Protected ownership predates this audit, but the historical run report is already absent and must not weaken or remove its reserved identity.
legacy_absent_owned_paths..pdd/meta/agentic_sync_python_run.json: Protected ownership predates this audit, but the historical run report is already absent and must not weaken or remove its reserved identity.

non_architectural_runtime_dependencies.reason: The current implementation reuses private orchestration helpers across layers. Treating those imports as generation-order dependencies creates cycles through the pre-checkup gate; they remain visible refactoring debt rather than false DAG edges.

The extractor lazily preprocesses its own LLM template while preprocess uses the extractor for semantic includes. The reverse lazy import remains explicit refactoring debt; preprocess is the architectural dependent.

prompt_without_local_artifact.pdd/prompts/core_dump_smoke_python.promp: Minimal add(a, b) fixture used to smoke-test core-dump capture; it is not a production module.
prompt_without_local_artifact.pdd/prompts/server/routes/session_python: Legacy remote-session route prompt whose proposed local endpoint is not present in the current server and requires an explicit product decision before generation.
